span.p: Is the obligation probable and estimable - ASC 450

span.p: Is there a reliable run rate from prior periods

span.p: Run-rate extrapolation - prior 3-period average - document variance from prior

span.p: Can a range be estimated - ASC 450 probable range

span.p: Accrue minimum of range or best estimate within range - document basis

span.p: Wait for invoice - flag as open in close tracker - no plug
